case_title: MARCEL GRIFFITH VS. CHARLES L WHITE

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-12-2022 - JUDGMENT.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$0.00) SERVED NOV-17-2021, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT WHITE, CHARLES L

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GRIFFITH, MARCEL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WHITE, CHARLES L $8,350.00 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $8,425.00, DEFENDANT SHALL PAY PLAINTIFF $500.00 EVERY OTHER FRIDAY UNTIL THE TOTAL AMOUNT OF $8350 PLUS COSTS IS PAID OFF IN FULL. PAYMENTS ARE ENCOURAGED TO MADE ELECTRONICALLY VIA CASH APP. THE FIRST PAYMENT OF $500 IS DUE TO PLAINTIFF BY FRIDAY FEBRUARY 4TH, 2022, AND EVERY OTHER FRIDAY THEREAFTER. THE COURT ARRIVED AT THE AMOUNT OWED BASED ON THE STIMULUS REFUNDS DEPOSITED INTO DEFENDANT'S ACCOUNT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-12-2022 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-12-2022 BY MICHELLE TONG. PLAINTIFF MARCEL GRIFFITH IS PRESENT WITH WITNESS MARIA JOHNSON. DEFENDANT CHARLES L. WHITE IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY GRIFFITH, MARCEL AS TO DEFENDANT WHITE, CHARLES L ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-12-2022 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION FOR ADDRESS UPDATE. FILED BY DEFENDANT WHITE, CHARLES L
